message:
chore(gitignore): collapse root-level scratch test_* files to a single glob + cover ubs.txt and beads lock files

Three small additions to .gitignore based on the scratch detritus that
recent agent sessions kept leaving behind in an uncommitted-but-visible
state:

1. Root-level scratch files for quick `cargo --example`-style one-offs
   (test_cycles, test_cycles_new, test_ext, test_flock, test_stack,
   test_stack2 as compiled binaries + their .rs twins, plus test.lock
   from flock experiments) were being listed individually and the
   list kept growing whenever someone invented a new scratch name.
   Replace the enumeration with a single `/test_*` glob anchored at
   the repo root. This catches any scratch file or directory whose
   name starts with `test_`.

   Real tests live in `/tests/` (no underscore, so not matched) and
   are unaffected. The enumeration previously included /test_file,
   /test_file.rs, /test_lock, /test_lock.rs, /test_cycle.rs plus the
   new entries; none were real artifacts. The old /test_*.sh pattern
   folds into /test_* as well.

2. UBS scan output already covered ubs.json and ubs_output.*; add
   ubs.txt (the plain-text variant `ubs <path> > ubs.txt` that a few
   sessions dump to when eyeballing results without jq).

3. Add .beads/*.lock to the beads ephemeral-files block. The MCP
   handler now acquires .beads/.write.lock and .beads/.sync.lock on
   every mutating request (see 3a40ad0 refactor(mcp): share the CLI
   write-lock lifecycle), so these lock files appear in the working
   tree any time `br serve` or a concurrent `br` command runs. They
   are never meaningful to commit.

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@ Thumbs.db
 # Beads ephemeral files (runtime artifacts, not issues.jsonl)
 .beads/last-touched
 .beads/.bv.lock
+.beads/*.lock
 
 # Coverage reports
 /coverage/
@@ -120,13 +121,10 @@ sample_beads_db_files/**/*.db-wal
 -memorytest.db
 *memorytest.db
 
-# Root-level test scratch files (agent-generated)
-/test_file
-/test_file.rs
-/test_lock
-/test_lock.rs
-/test_cycle.rs
-/test_*.sh
+# Root-level test scratch files (agent-generated one-offs).
+# Real tests live in /tests/, which is `tests` (no underscore) and not matched.
+/test_*
+/test.lock
 /child.json
 /parent.json
 
@@ -135,6 +133,7 @@ sample_beads_db_files/**/*.db-wal
 
 # UBS scan output
 ubs.json
+ubs.txt
 ubs_output.*
 rust-bug-scan.txt
 report.json
